---
title: ""
---

<div class="home-hero">

<div class="hero-grid">

<div class="profile-card">

<div class="profile-frame">

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/Samridhi_Headshot.jpeg")
```

</div>

<h2>Samridhi Purohit</h2>

<p class="profile-subtitle">
<strong>MPH Candidate, Global Health</strong><br>
Rollins School of Public Health<br>
Emory University
</p>

</div>

<div class="hero-content">

<p class="eyebrow">Public Health Portfolio</p>

<p>
Welcome to my professional portfolio. This website brings together selected graduate projects, public health data work, and professional materials from my MPH training at Emory University.
</p>

<p>
My work emphasizes clear communication, practical analysis, and evidence-informed approaches to public health challenges.
</p>

<p>
Use this site to explore my projects, learn more about my background, or view my curriculum vitae.
</p>

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="projects.html" class="button-link">View My Projects</a>
<a href="about.html" class="button-link secondary-button">Learn More About Me</a>
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

## What You’ll Find Here

<div class="card-container">

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Graduate Projects</h3>
<p>Selected work from my public health and data science coursework, including dashboards and reproducible analyses.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Public Health Interests</h3>
<p>A closer look at the health areas and professional questions that shape my academic and applied work.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Professional Materials</h3>
<p>Links to my curriculum vitae, GitHub profile, and examples of work that reflect my training and skills.</p>
</div>

</div>
